commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Annual Budget tool (1-year P&L with monthly breakdown)

- Sales forecast, direct costs, overheads by category
- Monthly P&L table with FY totals and % of revenue
- KPI cards: Revenue, Gross Profit, Overheads, EBITDA
- 4 charts: Revenue vs Costs, Monthly EBITDA, Overhead breakdown, Cumulative EBITDA
- Excel template download + upload
- PDF export with branded report

fix: gate PRs on Chromatic errors, fix AccessibilityTest story (#156)

* fix: correct AccessibilityTest story assertion for focus visibility

The test checked for focus:opacity-100 on the options button, but
focus visibility is handled by the parent container's
focus-within:opacity-100 class. Updated assertion to match the actual
DOM structure.

Closes #154

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: gate PRs on Chromatic — wait for results, fail on errors

Replace exitOnceUploaded with exitZeroOnChanges so the CI job waits
for Chromatic to finish running snapshots. Visual changes exit 0
(reviewed in Chromatic UI), but component errors fail the build.

Also added "Visual Regression (Chromatic)" as a required status check
on main branch protection.

commit.message:
Add tests for recovery-path and spawn-path ticker assignment

4 new tests covering the IBDataAgent-level logic that sets state.ticker
on risk managers during position recovery and spawn:
- recovery from instrument.symbol
- recovery from parent_strategy fallback
- recovery with no info (empty ticker)
- spawn from instrument.symbol

These mirror the exact assignment logic in ib_data_agent.py to catch
regressions in the recovery path independently of engine-level tests.

commit.message:
Fix draft JSON parsing when LLM outputs literal newlines in strings

On-device models often put literal newlines inside JSON string values,
which is invalid JSON. The parser now has a 4-step fallback chain:
1. Direct JSON decode
2. Sanitize literal newlines inside string values, then decode
3. Regex extraction of draft_text value
4. Plain text fallback (increased limit to 5000 chars for Substack)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix system prompt token count in context inspector

the placeholder display text. Export the constant from ai-client.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(api): AIチャットのタイトル切り詰めでUTF-8文字境界を考慮 (#3372)

* fix(api): TiDB接続DSNにcharset=utf8mb4を追加

NewTiDBClient()のDSNにCollationとcharsetパラメータが欠落しており、
接続時のcharsetがサーバーデフォルト（latin1等）になっていたため、
日本語テキスト挿入時にError 1366が発生していた。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(api): TiDB DSNテストの期待値にcharset/collationを追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(api): AIチャットのタイトル切り詰めをrune単位に修正

title[:50]はバイト単位でスライスするため、日本語(UTF-8で1文字3バイト)の
文字境界の途中で切断され、不正なUTF-8バイト列が生成されていた。
[]runeに変換してから切り詰めることで、文字単位で正しく切り詰める。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add meal confirmation flow: pending actions + confirm-before-logging

When the nutrition agent analyzes a food photo, the orchestrator now stores
the parsed meal data as a pending action in conversation_context. On the
next message, if the user confirms ("yes", "log it", etc.), the orchestrator
executes the meal log and clears the pending action. If the user sends
something unrelated, the pending action is cleared silently.

New HealthDataService methods: store_pending_action, get_pending_action,
clear_pending_action. New orchestrator method: _check_pending_action.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Phase 8 — polish and production hardening (#46)

Dark mode:
- Add ThemeToggle (sun/moon) to sidebar footer via UserMenu
- Inline script in root layout prevents flash of wrong theme (respects system preference + localStorage)

Mobile responsiveness:
- SidebarShell client component: hamburger button + overlay backdrop on mobile
- Admin layout uses SidebarShell; sidebar hides off-screen on <md, slides in on tap
- TopBar adds pl-14 on mobile to clear the hamburger button
- Tables (clients, tasks, invoices) get overflow-x-auto + min-w for horizontal scroll
- Kanban board: grid-cols-1 → sm:grid-cols-2 → lg:grid-cols-4

Loading skeletons:
- Add loading.tsx for /clients, /invoices, /time, /time/list, /email-log

Error boundaries:
- app/(admin)/error.tsx + not-found.tsx
- app/portal/[tenantSlug]/error.tsx + not-found.tsx
- app/not-found.tsx (global 404)

Email log page:
- /email-log — read-only table of last 200 sent emails (type, to, subject, status)
- Added Mail nav item to Sidebar

Security:
- Upload route: 20 MB → 10 MB limit
- Email routes (task-closed, invoice, comment) now require authenticated user via createClient()
- Admin email routes (task-closed, invoice) require role === "admin"

Hydration fix:
- TaskBoardView: toLocaleDateString(undefined) → "en-US"

Tests:
- Update upload.test.ts: MAX_SIZE 20MB → 10MB assertions
- Update task-closed.test.ts + comment.test.ts: mock createClient, add 401 test cases

README:
- Mark all phases complete (6a–8)
- Add test commands, dark mode, mobile, email log to feature list

commit.message:
Fix 401 auth errors: auto-refresh token and retry on post failure

The X API was rejecting tokens that our DB thought were still valid.
Added forceRefreshToken() and postTweetWithRetry() which automatically
refreshes the token and retries once when a 401 is received. All callers
(approve endpoint, cron poller, publisher) now use postTweetWithRetry
instead of raw postTweet for resilient posting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(llm): use OLLAMA_HOST consistently across getModel and doctor

isLLMAvailable already checked OLLAMA_HOST, but getModel() and
doctor.ts only checked OLLAMA_BASE_URL — so the system could report
Ollama as available but then connect to localhost instead of the
actual OLLAMA_HOST value.

- Extract resolveOllamaBaseUrl() helper with http:// prefix normalization
- Use it in getModel() and doctor.ts
- OLLAMA_HOST (host:port) is auto-prefixed with http://

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: updateShapeDimensions now updates LocPinX and LocPinY

PageXmlCache.updateShapeDimensions only wrote Width/Height, leaving
LocPinX/LocPinY stale. For rotated or off-centre shapes this caused
visible drift on every dimension change. The bug affected both the
public ShapeModifier.updateShapeDimensions path and
ContainerEditor.resizeContainerToFit.

Added the two missing upserts, matching the pattern already used in
resizeShape. Two regression tests added to RotationResize.test.ts.

Fixes Bug 7 from BUGS.md.

commit.message:
feat: Voice Bridge — browser speech-to-text for Jarvis

Custom in-house voice-to-code solution replacing Otter.ai dependency.
Uses Web Speech API (built into Chrome/Edge) — zero external deps.

Features:
- Real-time speech transcription in browser
- Continuous listening mode (auto-restarts)
- Send to Jarvis via /web/chat endpoint
- Copy to clipboard for pasting into Claude Code
- Auto-send mode for hands-free operation
- Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Space (listen), Ctrl+Enter (send)
- Settings persist in localStorage
- Served at /voice from Jarvis HTTP server

Both Will and Freedom can open /voice in their browsers and
speak into their respective bots (Jarvis/Poseidon).

commit.message:
fix(pcb): channel-aware placement groups passives near input connectors

Rewrote rpi_hat_constraints() placement strategy:
- U1 (ADC) placed at board centre with FIXED priority
- J2-J5 screw terminals on BOTTOM edge (opposite J1 GPIO header)
- Channel passives (R_top, R_bot, C_filter) NEAR their screw terminal
  via SENS→AIN net tracing (R1+R5+C3 near J2, R2+R6+C4 near J3, etc.)
- Pull-up/address resistors (R9-R13) NEAR SW1 via shared nets
- SW1 NEAR U1 for short I2C/ADDR traces

Placement now respects signal topology: each voltage divider channel's
components are grouped between their input connector and the ADC.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(agents): SDK evolution researchers M4 — Assessment Agent Worker (#341)

* feat(agents): add AssessmentAgentWorker with WorkerAPIBase contract

New containerized assessment agent worker following the same pattern as
DesignAgentWorker. Accepts strategy metrics via POST /assessments/start,
invokes Claude Code via AgentRuntime, and extracts structured verdicts
from save_assessment MCP tool calls. Includes placeholder system prompt
(full prompt in Task 4.2) and 26 unit tests covering endpoint, result
extraction, background execution, and prompt composition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(agents): write assessment agent system prompt with analysis rubric

Replaces placeholder with full ~75-line system prompt following D7 slim
prompt pattern. Defines analysis rubric (Sharpe, drawdown, trade count,
consistency), verdict guidelines (promising/neutral/poor), output contract
via save_assessment MCP tool, hypothesis generation guidance, and
discovery tools + filesystem access paths. 11 prompt content tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(agents): add memory integration to assessment worker

After successful assessment, saves experiment record to memory/experiments/
and new hypotheses to memory/hypotheses.yaml using existing memory module.
Memory operations are best-effort — failures log warnings but don't block
operation completion. 4 new tests covering save, hypotheses, failure
tolerance, and no-save-on-failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(agents): add assessment-agent-1 Docker service

Adds assessment-agent-1 to docker-compose.sandbox.yml following the same
pattern as design-agent-1: ktrdr-agent:dev image, Claude auth volume,
shared data/memory/MCP mounts, port 5020, healthcheck, and auto-register
with backend. Strategies mounted read-only (assessment only reads them).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(agents): E2E validate assessment agent worker (M4.5)

Add missing DB env vars (KTRDR_DB_HOST, etc.) to both agent container
services in docker-compose. Design E2E test for assessment-agent
metrics-to-verdict flow. Assessment agent produces valid verdicts with
specificity to input metrics, saves experiment records and hypotheses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(agents): address PR review — verdict condition, strategies :ro, handoff

- Fix extract condition from `verdict or strategy_name` to `verdict and
  strategy_name` so assessments without a verdict are not recorded
- Remove :ro from assessment-agent strategies mount so save_assessment
  MCP tool can write assessment files (root cause of assessment_path null)
- Update stale handoff placeholder description for Task 4.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove storage_partition from sysbuild overlay to fix DTS label conflict

The DTS compiler sees storage_partition label on both the base DTS's
partition@0 (which survives /delete-node/ across overlay files) and
the sysbuild overlay's partition@a0000. Dropping the re-definition
resolves the conflict — OTA builds don't need general storage.

Fix: use gemini-2.5-flash (only model available for this API key)

gemini-2.0-flash and gemini-1.5-flash both return 404 "no longer available
to new users". gemini-2.5-flash is confirmed working via direct API test.
Also added explicit 60s function timeout in netlify.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

d36: full unfreeze breakthrough — 15 laps, 3 pits, 23.6 m/s, 3427 reward

First attempt (cv2 direct transfer) failed: ppo_curriculum_v2 was trained
WITHOUT tyre degradation, so its frozen driving policy crashes when mu drops
with tyre_life (mu = mu_base × tyre_life → half grip at tl=0.5).

Revised approach: load d35, unfreeze all 36,874 params (vs 131 in d32-d35).
The W_pit[128]=-30 direct tyre_life connection acts as a gradient anchor —
too large to meaningfully change in 2M steps — preserving pit strategy while
features, throttle, and steer all evolve freely.

Results (fixed start, deterministic):
  D36: reward=3426.68, laps=15, speed=23.60 m/s, lateral=0.456 m, pits=3
  D35: reward=2688.25, laps=11, speed=17.69 m/s, lateral=1.158 m, pits=1
  → +27.5% reward, +4 laps, +33% speed, -61% lateral error, +2 pit stops!
  → Pit strategy fully preserved: W_pit[128]=-30.02 (unchanged), threshold=0.599

Now within striking distance of ppo_curriculum_v2 (4531/17 laps/26.9 m/s).
Gap: -1105 reward, -2 laps, -3.3 m/s (d36 has pit overhead: 3 pits × -200).

New files: rl/train_ppo_pit_v4_d36.py, rl/ppo_pit_v4_d36.zip, Notes/d36.txt
           runs/ppo_pit_v4_d36/
Modified:  rl/evaluate.py (d36 entry), Notes/PROGRESS.txt, memory/MEMORY.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: Solyd Strategies portfolio site (Next.js App Router)

Complete portfolio site for Lydia Moore / Solyd Strategies LLC, built to
replace the existing Format.com site at solydstrategies.com. Deployed free
on Vercel; domain will be pointed here when ready.

## Stack
- Next.js 15 App Router (TypeScript)
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Raleway font (Google Fonts via next/font)
- Formspree for contact form (placeholder ID — swap before launch)
- All images stored locally in /public/images/

## Pages
- / — Home: hero heading, SVG wave divider (ported from Format.com DOM),
        welcome section, resume download link, 3-photo row, CTA cards
- /about — Bio, 10 personal facts, "Behind the Name" (Why >? / Solyd)
- /work — Portfolio grid (5 categories: animation/motion, print media,
          editorial/copy, graphic design, UX design)
- /work/[category] — Individual portfolio pages with image grids
- /contact — Two-column layout: contact info + Formspree form
- /blog — Markdown-powered blog (gray-matter + remark)
- /blog/[slug] — Individual post pages with Article JSON-LD

## Design system
- Primary color: #021323 (dark navy) — all text
- Background: white throughout
- Navigation: centered header, Solyd Strategies title, nav links, social icons
  (brand-filled Instagram + LinkedIn SVGs scraped from live site), Share
  dropdown (Facebook, Twitter, Tumblr, Pinterest)
- Footer: mirrors nav social row

## SEO (comprehensive)
- sitemap.xml — all 16 routes auto-generated via app/sitemap.ts
- robots.txt — allows all, points to sitemap
- Global JSON-LD @graph: ProfessionalService + Person (Lydia Moore) + WebSite
  schemas with Charlotte NC address, phone, email, service catalog, social profiles
- Per-page metadata: unique titles, keyword-rich descriptions, canonical URLs,
  OpenGraph + Twitter card tags on every page
- Blog posts: Article JSON-LD (author, publisher, datePublished, image)
- Contact page: ContactPage JSON-LD with NAP (name/address/phone) signals
- Target keywords: "social media manager Charlotte NC", "graphic designer
  Charlotte NC", "content creator Charlotte NC", "freelance digital marketer
  Charlotte", "brand identity design", "small business social media management"

## Key files
- app/layout.tsx — global metadata, JSON-LD, Raleway font
- app/sitemap.ts — XML sitemap
- app/robots.ts — robots.txt
- components/Navigation.tsx — header with Share dropdown, brand social icons
- components/Footer.tsx — footer with Share dropdown
- components/ContactForm.tsx — client component (extracted so contact page
  can export server-side metadata)
- lib/blog.ts — Markdown blog utilities (gray-matter + remark)
- content/blog/ — 3 blog posts as .md files with frontmatter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: allow HCP test ping + add public SMS consent page for A2P approval

HCP sends {"foo":"bar"} POST to verify webhook URL — bypass signature
check for test payload. Added /sms-consent page with verbal opt-in
script and CTIA disclosures for A2P 10DLC campaign resubmission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix redirect loop on all SEO pages by adding trailingSlash: false

Firebase Hosting was redirecting /path → /path/ (directory default),
while explicit redirect rules sent /path/ → /path, causing ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS
on all 42 prerendered pages. trailingSlash: false serves path/index.html
directly at /path and handles trailing-slash stripping globally, so
all manual trailing-slash redirects are removed. Legacy path renames kept.

commit.message:
fix: expand PATH for agent binary resolution in non-interactive contexts

When Agemon is started from systemd, launchd, or an IDE, the PATH may
not include user binary directories like ~/.local/bin or ~/.bun/bin.
This caused "opencode not found" errors even when the binary was installed.
